characters.name: Ai
characters.description: AiアイGenderFemaleHair ColorVioletEye ColorRedBirthday12 SeptemberHeight160cmBust-Waist-Hips92-59-86cmAppears InTick! Tack!Voice ActorMimura Sachiko アイ Ai(アイ,Ai?)is a side character in the Shuffle! series and a main character in the Shuffle! sequelTick! Tack. She wasForbesii's fiancé in the past. Ai is a fair lady and maybe a part of the Royal Family of the Demon World. She is well-educated, graceful, and gentle and has always been seen smiling sweetly. Her speech, thoughts, and actions can be considered 'Big-Sisterly.' She often refers to herself as "Ai-Onee San" towardsRin Tsuchimiand even with those who seem to be older than she is. She has several 'over-leisurely' habits, including taking long baths (according to her, her average time in the bathroom is about 4 hours) or lazing time away enjoying the cool breeze on the mansion's balcony. When they first meet her, Rin and the others believe that Ai isNerine's mother since Nerine shares her grace and a similar physical appearance.

characters.name: Ama Shigure
characters.description: Shigure Ama時雨 亜麻GenderFemaleHair ColorStrawberry BlondeEye ColorVioletBirthday3 JuneHeight158cmBust-Waist-Hips83-55-84cmRoleDemon, MotherAppears InSide character -Really? Really!Side character -Shuffle!Voice ActorYuria(Japanese)Jamie Marchi(English) 時雨 亜麻 Ama Shigure(時雨 亜麻,Shigure Ama?)is a side character in the Shuffle! series. She is the mother ofAsa Shigure. Ama has a lively personality and speaks in a sloppy tone. In addition, she was frequently mistaken for Asa's younger sister due to her childish demeanor and appearance. Nonetheless, her qualities as a mother are first-class, and she takes care ofher daughterdearly. Ama and Asa seem, at surface observation, to be more like good friends than an average mother and daughter relationship. She is also talented in the culinary arts, though not as proficient as her daughter.

characters.name: Asa Shigure
characters.description: Shigure Asa時雨 亜沙Princess x PrincessShuffle!AliasesAsa-senpai (by Kaede and Sia)The Shocking Shigure (by Sia[1])GenderFemaleHair ColorGreenEye ColorVioletBirthday20 OctoberHeight163cmBust-Waist-Hips87-60-85cmLikesBaking cake, EffortDislikesMagicAppears InMain character -Really? Really!Main character -Shuffle!Side character -Shuffle! Love RainbowSide Character -Princess x PrincessVoice ActorMiki Itō(Japanese)Monica Rial(English) The Shocking Shigure (by Sia[1]) Asa Shigure(時雨 亜沙,Shigure Asa?)is a main character in the Shuffle! series. She is a senior atVerbena Academyand in the cooking club withKaede Fuyou. She andRin Tsuchimishare a love-hate relationship (though they're more like bad company to each other) and she is the best friend ofKareha. While she has a weak constitution, Asa makes up for it with her energetic personality. Despite being a touch of a tomboy, she is an excellent cook. She often uses English loan words and is notable for her "Hello!" greeting, her catchphrase. She is responsible and diligent but also cheerful and quick to join in group activities. However, she also has a lesser-known tendency to depend on others. She enjoys hard work and eating cake. She has a dislike for magic because her demon power always caused her to be sick during childhood.

characters.name: Chalcedony
characters.description: ChalcedonyカルセドニーAliasesChal-nii (byKunzite)GenderMaleHair ColorWhiteEye ColorRedBirthday8 OctoberHeight203cmRoleKingLikesHis Family and Friends, houseworkDislikesFraud, ConspiraciesAppears InShuffle! Episode 2Voice ActorIchinose Subaru カルセドニー Chalcedony(カルセドニー,Chalcedony?)is a side character inShuffle! Episode 2. 100 years after the events of the original Shuffle, he is the current reigning King of the Devils and the father ofNelia. The current Demon King. UnlikeForbessi, he is strong and a blunt demon king. He has a muscular body and a stern facial structure. He is also a rather clumsy father but works hard every day to protect his sick wife.

characters.name: Daisy
characters.description: DaisyデイジーGenderFemaleHair ColorPurpleEye ColorPlumBirthday6 MarchHeight156cmBust-Waist-Hips81-57-82Appears InShuffle! Essence+Voice ActorKomugi Nishida(Japanese) デイジー Daisy(デイジー,Daisy?)is a side character in theShuffleseries. She appears as a heroine inShuffle! Essence+. Daisy is a bubbly girl with antsunderepersonality. Her pet isErica Suzuran, a shape shifting rabbit. She loves video games and is especially skilled at fighting and music games. She even has a part time job working as a maid at the local arcade.

He was the father ofRin Tsuchimiand husband ofMs. Tsuchimi.Kaede Fuyou's fatherMikio Fuyouand him were best friends, giving Hatsune the nickname "Hatobei."

characters.name: Itsuki Midoriba
characters.description: Midoriba Itsuki緑葉樹GenderMaleHair ColorBrownEye ColorBrownBirthday14 MarchHeight178cmRoleClassmate, Friend, High School Student, WomanizerAppears InSide character -Really? Really!Side character -Shuffle!Side character -Shuffle! Love RainbowSide character -Tick! Tack!Voice ActorHideki Ogihara(Japanese)Todd Haberkorn(English) 緑葉樹 Itsuki Midoriba(緑葉樹,Midoriba Itsuki?)is side character in theShuffle!series. He is a classmate and friend of the characters in Shuffle atVerbena Academywho serves as a comedic foil toRin Tsuchimi. Itsuki addresses himself as "oresama," a rather arrogant version of "ore" (the masculine word for "I" in Japanese). He is a womanizer who enjoys checking out pretty girls. This is shown at the beginning of the visual game when Rin observed him andKing of Devilsrating the women that walked by. Itsuki appears to be very smart and insightful, as he always scores high on exams and stresses contempt when Rin does better than him. He is also helpful in explaining things and situations that Rin and the others may not understand fully.

characters.name: Kaede Fuyou
characters.description: Fuyou Kaede芙蓉 楓Princess x PrincessShuffle!AliasesKaede (yobisute by both Asa andTsuchimi)Kae-chan (by Sia in ep 4)GenderFemaleHair ColorOrangeEye ColorBlueBirthday10 NovemberHeight162cmBust-Waist-Hips83-59-84cmLikesDoing her best for RinDislikesBothering RinAppears InMain character -Shuffle!Main character -Really? Really!Main character -Shuffle! Love RainbowSide Character -Princess x PrincessVoice ActorYuko Goto(Japanese)Carrie Savage(English) 芙蓉 楓 Kae-chan (by Sia in ep 4) Kaede is an attractive young lady who is very modest, polite, and clear-headed. She is also excellent at housework. Nevertheless, she frequently prioritizesRin Tsuchimito the point that she neglects herself. In the anime adaptation, however, she shows classic signs of ayandere. Her eyes become soulless, and the usually gentle face becomes hostile and menacing whenever she is in that state. She is shown to have severe mental distress and acts violently when a great shock upsets her.

characters.name: Kareha
characters.description: KarehaカレハGenderFemaleHair ColorBlondeEye ColorGreenBirthday1 SeptemberHeight156cmBust-Waist-Hips82-56-83cmRoleHigh School Student, WaitressAppears InMain character -Shuffle! Essence+Side character -Shuffle!,Really? Really!,Shuffle! Love RainbowVoice ActorYura Hinata(Japanese)Colleen Clinkenbeard(English) カレハ Kareha(カレハ,Kareha?)is a side character in theShuffleseries. She isAsa Shigure's best friend andRin Tsuchimi's senior. Kareha has a laid-back and calming personality. Although, she is an excessive romanticist and has an unusually strong delusional habit, and she often creates a love story in her head whenever she sees something romantic or cute and starts to daydream. While having said daydream, she says her catchphrase "Maa! Maa!! Maa!!!" (Translated to "My!! My!! My!!!")  This can be seen various times in the anime and visual novels when Asa and Rin are together, and she starts "fangirling" about them together. She is mildly oblivious to her own actions (leaning over in front of Rin wearing a short dress) and things around but her charm makes up for it. Like Asa, Kareha shares a love for cooking, having many cooking books at her home. Her favorite thing to make is fruit desserts.
characters.personality_section: Kareha has a laid-back and calming personality. Although, she is an excessive romanticist and has an unusually strong delusional habit, and she often creates a love story in her head whenever she sees something romantic or cute and starts to daydream. While having said daydream, she says her catchphrase "Maa! Maa!! Maa!!!" (Translated to "My!! My!! My!!!")  This can be seen various times in the anime and visual novels when Asa and Rin are together, and she starts "fangirling" about them together. She is mildly oblivious to her own actions (leaning over in front of Rin wearing a short dress) and things around but her charm makes up for it. Like Asa, Kareha shares a love for cooking, having many cooking books at her home. Her favorite thing to make is fruit desserts.

She isAsa Shigure's best friend andRin Tsuchimi's senior. Kareha has a laid-back and calming personality. Although, she is an excessive romanticist and has an unusually strong delusional habit, and she often creates a love story in her head whenever she sees something romantic or cute and starts to daydream. While having said daydream, she says her catchphrase "Maa! Maa!! Maa!!!" (Translated to "My!! My!! My!!!")  This can be seen various times in the anime and visual novels when Asa and Rin are together, and she starts "fangirling" about them together. She is mildly oblivious to her own actions (leaning over in front of Rin wearing a short dress) and things around but her charm makes up for it. Like Asa, Kareha shares a love for cooking, having many cooking books at her home. Her favorite thing to make is fruit desserts.

characters.name: Kikyou
characters.description: KikyouキキョウPrincess x PrincessShuffle!AliasesKikyoGenderFemaleHair ColorRedEye ColorAmberBirthdayJuly 30Height160 cmBust-Waist-Hips81-58-83cmLikesFreedomDislikesConfinementAppears InMain character -Shuffle! Love RainbowSide character -Shuffle! Essence+Side Character -Princess x PrincessVoice ActorSayaka Aoki(Japanese) キキョウ Kikyou(キキョウ,Kikyō?)isLisianthus’ younger twin sister and a side character in the Shuffle! series. Kikyou a bit more mischievous than Sia and is also far more insecure and shyer. Being unaccustomed to dealing with other people, Kikyou is rather awkward around everyone at first. When she feels comfortable around the people at hand, Kikyou becomes more outgoing than Sia with a straightforward type of manner and speech.

characters.name: King of Devils
characters.description: ForbesiiフォーベシイAliasesKing of Devils, 魔王GenderMaleHair ColorGreyEye ColorRedBirthday13 AprilHeight180cmRoleDemon, Father, HusbandAppears InSide character -Really? Really!Side character -Shuffle!Side character -Tick! Tack!Voice ActorToshiyuki Morikawa(Japanese)Vic Mignogna(English) フォーベシイ Forbesii(フォーベシイ,Forbesii?), better known asKing of Devils, isNerine's father and a side character in theShuffle!series. He is the Lord in The Realm of the Devils. He is a flirty character and thus quickly gets along withItsuki Midoribaat the beginning of the game. He is also the husband ofSage, the mother of Nerine. He loves to do household chores such as cooking and cleaning. He is more westernized than the King of Gods. This can be seen from him asking Rin to call him "Papa."

characters.name: King of Gods
characters.description: EustomaユーストマAliasesShin-chan[1]GenderMaleHair ColorBlackEye ColorBrownBirthday6 MayHeight191cmRoleKingAppears InSide character -Really? Really!Side character -Shuffle!Voice ActorJūrōta Kosugi(Japanese)Travis Willingham(English) ユーストマ Eustoma(ユーストマ,Eustoma?), more commonly known asKing of Gods, isLisianthus' father and a side character in the Shuffle! series. He is in control of the realm of the gods. He has three wives, one beingCineraria, the mother of Lisianthus. Eustoma is big, musclebound, and enjoys drinking sake. Despite his best intentions, he often embarrasses his daughter, and it is a running gag in the series that she frequently has to hit him with a chair to calm him down, to his great displeasure.

She is also a side character inPrincess x Princess. 木下 きらら Kirara is a first year and is enrolled in the same theater department asKohaku. She is always very excited and speaks fast, and often speaks with a strange Japanese accent.

characters.name: Kunzite
characters.description: KunziteクンツァイトAliasesKun-chan (byChalcedony)GenderMaleHair ColorBlackEye ColorRedBirthday24 AprilHeight186 cmRoleKingLikesHis Family and FriendsDislikesFoolish PeopleAppears InShuffle! Episode 2Voice ActorToorisugari クンツァイト Kunzite(クンツァイト,Kunzite?)is a side character inShuffle! Episode 2. 100 years after the events of the original Shuffle, he is the current King of the Gods and the father ofLithia. He is the son of Lishianthus' much younger brother who was born after the events ofShuffle!. He is quite fond of the old Japanese culture. He is a smart and great leader, but physically not as strong as theEustoma. His daughter Lithia is also rather weak.

characters.name: Limes
characters.description: LimestoneリムストンAliasesLimesGenderFemaleHair ColorLavenderEye ColorVioletHeight145cmBust-Waist-Hips76-54-79cmLikesnothing specialDislikesnothing specialAppears InShuffle! Episode 2Voice ActorHaruka Sora リムストン Limestone(リムストン,Limestone?), better known asLimes(ライム,Limes?)is a character in theShuffleseries and main character inShuffle! Episode 2. Limes is a mysterious girl with an enormous amount of magical power equal to that of her mother. She closely resembles Primula and also has trouble expressing her emotion at the beginning of the story, much like her mother in the events ofShuffle.

characters.name: Lisianthus
characters.description: LisianthusリシアンサスPrincess x PrincessShuffle!AliasesSia, シアGenderFemaleHair ColorRedEye ColorAmberBirthdayJuly 30Height160 cmBust-Waist-Hips81-58-83cmRoleHigh School Student, Princess, QueenLikesCookingDislikesExams, lonelinessAppears InMain character -Shuffle!Main character -Shuffle! Love RainbowSide character -Really? Really!Side character -Princess x PrincessVoice ActorSayaka Aoki(Japanese)Brittney Karbowski(English) リシアンサス Lisianthus(リシアンサス,Lisianthus?)orSia(シア,Sia?)for short, is a main character in theShuffleseries. She is the daughter ofEustomaandCinerariaand princess of the Gods. The single memory of her childhood meeting withRinhas brought her to the Human world to meet Rin. She is a second year atVerbena Academy. Her sister isKikyou. Sia is bright and energetic, her outgoing personality lets her talk at ease with anyone she meets and easily set the mood in conversation. She is very boastful and holds great optimism. Though poorly skilled at academics, she has excellent cooking skills. Her magical capability is poor, but she makes up for it with brute force by hitting people with objects ranging from chairs to tables. She is good friends with Kaede and Primula.
